items.docs: Get current status of an Alertmanager instance and its cluster

params.name: receiver_matchers
params.description: A matcher expression to filter by receiver labels. For example `owner="my-team"`. Can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

items.docs: Get list of all receivers (name of notification integrations)

params.name: filter
params.description: A matcher expression to filter silences. For example `alertname="MyAlert"`. It can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

items.docs: Post a new silence or update an existing one

params.name: silenceID
params.description: ID of the silence to get

items.docs: Get a silence by its ID

params.name: silenceID
params.description: ID of the silence to get

items.docs: Delete a silence by its ID

params.name: active
params.description: Include active alerts in results. If false, excludes active alerts and returns only suppressed (silenced or inhibited) alerts.

params.name: silenced
params.description: Include silenced alerts in results. If false, excludes silenced alerts. Note that true (default) shows both silenced and non-silenced alerts.

params.name: inhibited
params.description: Include inhibited alerts in results. If false, excludes inhibited alerts. Note that true (default) shows both inhibited and non-inhibited alerts.

params.name: unprocessed
params.description: Include unprocessed alerts in results. If false, excludes unprocessed alerts. Note that true (default) shows both processed and unprocessed alerts.

params.name: filter
params.description: A matcher expression to filter alerts. For example `alertname="MyAlert"`. It can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

params.name: receiver
params.description: A regex matching receivers to filter alerts by

params.name: receiver_matchers
params.description: A matcher expression to filter by receiver labels. For example `owner="my-team"`. Can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

params.name: active
params.description: Include active alerts within the returned groups. If false, excludes active alerts from groups and only shows suppressed (silenced or inhibited) alerts.

params.name: silenced
params.description: Include silenced alerts within the returned groups. If false, excludes silenced alerts from groups. Note that true (default) shows both silenced and non-silenced alerts.

params.name: inhibited
params.description: Include inhibited alerts within the returned groups. If false, excludes inhibited alerts from groups. Note that true (default) shows both inhibited and non-inhibited alerts.

params.name: muted
params.description: Include muted (silenced or inhibited) alert groups in results. If false, excludes entire groups where all alerts are muted.

params.name: filter
params.description: A matcher expression to filter alert groups. For example `alertname="MyAlert"`. It can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

params.name: receiver
params.description: A regex matching receivers to filter alerts by

params.name: receiver_matchers
params.description: A matcher expression to filter by receiver labels. For example `owner="my-team"`. Can be repeated to apply multiple matchers.

items.docs: Get a list of alert groups
